stemHtml: How do the Drag vs. Indicated Airspeed (IAS) and Drag vs. True Airspeed (TAS) curves move during a climb from 2000 ft to 8000 ft at a constant IAS?

options.a: Drag-IAS curve remains unchanged, Drag-TAS curve shifts right
options.b: Drag-IAS curve remains unchanged, Drag-TAS curve shifts left
options.c: Drag-IAS curve shifts right, Drag-TAS curve remains unchanged
